mapper.select:
select a.*,(select name from sys_org where a.create_org_id = id) as create_org_name from xm_notice a where a.is_delete = 0 and a.status = 1 and exists(select 1 from xm_person p left join sys_org o on p.org_id = o.id where p.id = #{personId} and (p.org_id = a.range_id or o.pids like concat('%[', a.range_id ,']%') ) )
and a.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
order by a.is_top desc,a.publish_time desc

select a.*,(select name from sys_user where id = a.create_by) as publish_name from xm_notice a where a.is_delete = 0 and a.status = 1 and exists(select 1 from xm_person p left join sys_org o on p.org_id = o.id where p.id = #{personId} and (p.org_id = a.range_id or a.range_id = 0 or o.pids like concat('%[', a.range_id ,']%') ) )
and a.type = #{type}
and a.title = CONCAT('%',#{title},'%')
ORDER BY a.is_top desc,a.publish_time desc

select a.*,(select name from sys_user where id = a.create_by) as publish_name from xm_notice a where a.is_delete = 0 and a.status = 1 and a.range_id = 0
and a.type = #{type}
and a.title = CONCAT('%',#{title},'%')
ORDER BY a.is_top desc,a.publish_time desc
